title: cyathea clandestina
intro: Cyathea clandestina, also known as the clandestine tree fern, is a species of tree fern native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Cyathea clandestina include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support immune function. It can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a valuable addition to holistic health regimens.
